# Public commands promised by the Milestone 1.1 CLI contract.
start
status
setup --default-channel ops --daemon-url http://127.0.0.1:25295 --discord-token-stdin
send --channel ops --message "hello"
emit hermes.agent.started --payload '{"session_id":"demo"}'
explain hermes.agent.started --payload '{"session_id":"demo"}'
config show
config path
config verify
hermes hook --provider gateway --payload '{"event":"agent:start"}'
hermes install-hooks --scope global --force
hermes uninstall-hooks --home /tmp/hermeship-test-home --dry-run
git commit --repo hermeship --branch main --commit 1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678 --summary "ship git source" --channel ops --repo-path /tmp/hermeship --worktree-path /tmp/hermeship-worktree
git branch-changed --repo hermeship --old-branch main --new-branch codex/milestone-8-git --channel ops --repo-path /tmp/hermeship --worktree-path /tmp/hermeship-worktree
github issue-opened --owner posp --repo hermeship --number 42 --title "Add deterministic GitHub source" --author synthetic-user --url https://github.example.invalid/posp/hermeship/issues/42 --channel ops
github pr-opened --owner posp --repo hermeship --number 17 --title "Ship GitHub source" --branch codex/milestone-8-github --base-branch main --commit 1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678 --channel ops
github check-failed --owner posp --repo hermeship --workflow ci --status failure --branch main --commit abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12 --title "cargo test failed" --channel ops
github release-published --owner posp --repo hermeship --tag v0.1.0 --title "Hermeship v0.1.0" --author synthetic-user --channel ops
tmux keyword --session hermes-agent --window main --pane %1 --keyword FAILED --line "build FAILED at deterministic fixture" --channel ops
tmux stale --session hermes-agent --window main --pane %2 --minutes 15 --last-line "waiting for agent output" --channel ops
tmux watch --session hermes-agent --keywords FAILED,complete --stale-minutes 10 --channel ops --tmux-output "hermes-agent	main	%1	0	bash	ready"
tmux list --tmux-output "hermes-agent	main	%1	0	bash	ready"
cron run dev-followup
memory init --root /tmp/hermeship-memory --project Hermeship --channel ops --agent codex --date 2026-06-17
memory status --root /tmp/hermeship-memory --project Hermeship --channel ops --agent codex --date 2026-06-17
install --dry-run
uninstall --remove-config --remove-state --remove-hooks --hermes-home /tmp/hermeship-test-home --dry-run
release preflight 0.1.0
